# E-Commerce AI Experiment 🛒

A full-stack e-commerce platform built as a "time pass" project to test the capabilities of the **Gemini CLI AI agent**.

### 🛠 Tech Stack
- **Frontend:** React + TypeScript (Vite)
- **Backend:** Django + REST Framework

### 🚀 Quick Start
- **Backend:** `pip install -r requirements.txt` && `python manage.py runserver`
- **Frontend:** `npm install` && `npm run dev`
